name: push-reminder
description: Shows a confirmation dialog before every git push — blocks the push until answered

pushReminder.message.default: Have you completed all required checks before pushing?
pushReminder.message.description: Question shown in the modal dialog before each git push.

pushReminder.obsidianChecklist.enabled.description: When enabled, reads a checklist from an Obsidian markdown file and shows it before each push. All items must be checked before pushing is allowed.

pushReminder.obsidianChecklist.filePath.description: Absolute path to the Obsidian markdown file containing the pre-push checklist. Lines formatted as `- [ ] item` are extracted as checklist items.
